eligibleReleaseUnionBlockingDecisionCoun.query: ScopedDecisionCount(union of every non-retired combination's exact bundle-dependency tuples)

preRetirementComparison.note: Before retirement, eligible union spanned v1+v2+v3+v4's combined closures (24 decisions/13 artifacts). After retirement, it collapses to exactly v4's closure (13/9) because only one combination remains eligible.

productionReadinessGuidance.fullCatalogProductionPublishing: eligibleReleaseUnionBlockingDecisionCount (13, currently identical to active-root since only one root is eligible)
productionReadinessGuidance.mustNeverUse: totalCatalogPlaceholderDecisionCount (36) as an active-root or Production blocker count

staleWordingCorrections.before: 36 blocking placeholders remain in the dependency closure (flat, undifferentiated)
staleWordingCorrections.after: three explicitly separated numbers: total-catalog (36), eligible-release-union (13, post-retirement), active-root-closure (13)

staleWordingCorrections.before: catalog/combinations/ten-k-4d-intermediate.v1.json now points its masterTemplate reference at v2 (stale)
staleWordingCorrections.after: v1 -> TEN_K_MASTER v1 (unchanged); v2 -> TEN_K_MASTER v2; v3 -> TEN_K_MASTER v2 + APPSEL_RACE_PLAN_V1 v2; v4 (active) -> TEN_K_MASTER v3 + APPSEL_RACE_PLAN_V1 v2

productionReadinessErrorContractUpdate.note: activeRootClosureBlockingArtifactCount (9) equals the Production negative publish test's top-level error count exactly, because the Production readiness guard groups errors by artifact identity, not by decision. activeRootClosureBlockingDecisionCount (13) must never be compared to the error count.
